mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO agent_agentscope_config (agent_definition_id, config_agent_id, mcp_servers, enable_tools, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.agentDefinitionId}, #{item.configAgentId}, #{item.mcpServers}, #{item.enableTools}, #{item.sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_definition_id, config_agent_id, mcp_servers, enable_tools, sort_order FROM agent_agentscope_config WHERE agent_definition_id = #{agentDefinitionId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
